view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for 'Fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes)' as evidenced by the linked use case, which explicitly states that clients can book 50-minute slots. Additionally, the successful booking entries from prior steps confirm that the system allows for these fixed-duration appointments, demonstrating operational compliance with the requirement. The evidence from the linked use case and the booking confirmations provides clear support for this validation.
